news.t: TCW to Change Listing Exchange of Equity ETFs to NASDAQ
GTS Selected as NYSE Designated Market Maker for Five ETFs From the TCW Group
TCW to Change Listing Exchange of ETFs to NYSE
Engine No. 1 Closes Sale of ETF Business to TCW
TCW Completes Acquisition of Engine No. 1 ETF Business
TCW buys Engine No. 1's ETF business
Underdog activist Engine No. 1 is launching an ETF after big Exxon win

holdings.infoBox: VOTE is an equity ETF with a total of 507 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.43%, Apple at 6.73%, Microsoft at 4.36%, Amazon.com at 3.61%, and Alphabet at 3.28%.

overview.description: The TCW Transform 500 ETF (VOTE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Morningstar US Large Cap Select index, a market-cap-weighted index consisting of large-cap US stocks VOTE was launched on Jun 22, 2021 and is issued by TCW.

data.title: TCW buys Engine No. 1's ETF business
data.text: Asset management firm TCW Group announced on Tuesday that it's buying the exchange-traded-fund business owned by activist investor Engine No. 1 for undisclosed terms.

data.title: How Engine No. 1 Took on Exxon
data.text: Aug.02 -- Earlier this year, Engine No. 1 took three board seats in Exxon to speed up the company's transition.

data.title: Activist investing enters the ETF realm: Engine No. 1 CEO on firm's mission
data.text: Engine No. 1 CEO Jennifer Grancio and DWS Group's Head of Systematic Investment Solutions for the Americas, Arne Noack, discuss the intersection of activist and ESG investing with CNBC's Bob Pisani.

data.title: Activist fund behind Exxon board battle launches ETF

data.title: What to know about Engine No. 1's new activist ETF

data.title: Underdog activist Engine No. 1 is launching an ETF after big Exxon win
data.text: The activist firm that waged a campaign against Exxon and successfully placed three candidates on the oil giant's board of directors, is launching a fund.
